description: Create a classic bouncing ball animation in Blender using the loaded baseline scene. Animate a UV Sphere starting at Z=4, X=-6 to bounce on the ground (Z=0) at least three times while traveling horizontally across the scene. The animation must feature realistic timing (acceleration and deceleration) and a timeline range from frame 1 to 120. Save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bouncing_ball.blend. The desktop session is already active with Blender open.
